entities.name: VEGETABLE SOYBEAN
entities.description: A crop introduced to Jharkhand, India, to provide local communities with an alternative protein source and diversify cropping systems

entities.name: JHARKHAND
entities.description: A state in India where vegetable soybean was introduced, tested, and produced

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where vegetable soybean is being promoted for human nutrition and cropping system diversification

entities.name: PROTEIN SOURCE
entities.description: A nutritional benefit provided by vegetable soybean to local communities

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: The agricultural system that vegetable soybean helps to diversify in Eastern India

entities.name: FIELD TESTING
entities.description: The process of testing different lines of vegetable soybean in farmers' fields

entities.name: TASTE SURVEY
entities.description: A method used to evaluate the acceptance of vegetable soybean by the local community

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing seeds of vegetable soybean cultivars, specifically Swarna Vasundhara, by farmers

entities.name: SWARNA VASUNDHARA
entities.description: A released cultivar of vegetable soybean produced by farmers in Jharkhand

entities.name: COLD STORAGE FACILITIES
entities.description: Infrastructure required to support a viable value chain for vegetable soybean

entities.name: VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The system of infrastructure and markets required to support the production and consumption of vegetable soybean

entities.name: GRAIN SOYBEAN
entities.description: A type of soybean grown in major states in India, distinct from vegetable soybean

entities.name: HUMAN NUTRITION
entities.description: The goal of improving health and nutrition through the introduction of vegetable soybean
